providers.description:
## Current status

This catalog entry tracks the SunPump launch route behind x402 payment. The gateway route is configured for TRON Mainnet/Nile and BNB Smart Chain payments, but the current SunPump upstream POST endpoint returns `405 Not Allowed`. Do not use it for successful token creation until SunPump publishes or restores an active launch API path.

## Intended use

The route is intended to submit token launch metadata after x402 payment settlement. Once the upstream API is active, callers should POST JSON metadata with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, optional social URLs, and optional image data.

## Code usage

Use the route only for payment-route integration testing while the upstream remains unavailable. A paid call may settle and then return the upstream `405 Not Allowed` response.

zh-CN.description:
## 当前状态

这个 catalog 条目用于记录接入 x402 支付的 SunPump 发币路由。Gateway 已配置 TRON Mainnet/Nile 和 BNB Smart Chain 支付路由，但当前 SunPump 上游 POST 接口返回 `405 Not Allowed`。在 SunPump 发布或恢复可用发币 API 之前，不要把它用于实际创建 token。

## 预期用途

该路由原本用于在 x402 支付结算后提交发币元数据。上游 API 恢复后，调用方应 POST 包含 `name`、`symbol`、`description`、可选社交链接和可选图片数据的 JSON 元数据。

## 调用说明

上游不可用期间，只建议用于检查支付路由配置。付费调用可能完成结算，然后返回上游 `405 Not Allowed` 响应。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 已配置的 SunPump 发币路由，上游当前不可用
zh-CN.subtitle: 支付路由已配置，但上游 POST 当前返回 405。
zh-CN.title: SunPump
zh-CN.useCase: 上游 SunPump 发币 API 不可用期间，仅用于检查已配置的 x402 支付路由。

providers.description:
## What it does

DefiLlama gateway over x402: read protocol TVL, fees/revenue and stablecoin metrics, multi-chain current & historical token prices with charts, and DeFi pool yields/APY — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents doing DeFi research, allocation and risk screening that need TVL / fees / stablecoin data.
- Pricing and valuation workflows that need multi-chain current and historical token prices.
- Yield scouting across pools by APY, TVL and risk.

## Endpoints

- `GET /protocols` — All protocols with current TVL, category and chain breakdown
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — Single protocol: historical TVL, fees, tokens, metadata
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — Current total TVL of a protocol (lightweight)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — Current USD price for one or many coins ({chain}:{address} or coingecko:{id}, comma-separated)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — Historical USD price at a unix timestamp for one or many coins
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — Price chart (time series) for one or many coins
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — Percentage price change over a period for one or many coins
- `GET /pools` — All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet/Nile (`exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet/Nile with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DefiLlama 的 x402 网关:读取协议 TVL、费用/收入与稳定币指标,多链代币现价+历史价+图表,以及 DeFi 资金池收益率/APY——一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC 两条付费路由。

## 适合场景

- 需要 TVL/费用/稳定币数据做 DeFi 研究、配置与风险筛查的 Agent。
- 需要多链现价与历史价的定价/估值流程。
- 按 APY、TVL 与风险挑选资金池。

## 接口

- `GET /protocols` — 所有协议的当前 TVL、分类与各链分布
- `GET /protocol/{slug}` — 单个协议:历史 TVL、费用、代币与元数据
- `GET /tvl/{protocol}` — 单个协议的当前总 TVL(轻量)
- `GET /prices/current/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币的当前美元价(支持 {chain}:{address} 或 coingecko:{id},逗号分隔)
- `GET /prices/historical/{timestamp}/{coins}` — 指定 unix 时间戳的历史美元价(单/多代币)
- `GET /chart/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币的价格时间序列(图表)
- `GET /percentage/{coins}` — 一个或多个代币某时段的涨跌幅
- `GET /pools` — 所有收益池的当前 APY、TVL、链、项目与风险标记
- `GET /chart/{pool}` — 单个资金池的历史 APY/TVL 时间序列

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网/Nile 测试网(`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网/Nile 测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-tron/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/defillama-tvl-bsc/protocols' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```
zh-CN.mainTitle: 聚合 DeFi 数据 — TVL、费用、价格、收益率
zh-CN.subtitle: 付费 DeFi 决策数据,供 Agent 研究、定价与风控。
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

providers.description:
## What it does

DexScreener market data over x402: search DEX trading pairs, read live price / liquidity / volume, and surface newly launched and trending tokens across major chains, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- New-pool / meme-launch radar for agents tracking fresh listings.
- Momentum and liquidity checks before entering a position.
- Pair lookups by token address or symbol.

## Endpoints

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` — All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
- `GET /latest/dex/search` — Search pairs by token name/symbol/address
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` — Latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar)

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet/Nile (`exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet/Nile with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DexScreener 行情的 x402 网关:搜索 DEX 交易对,读取实时价格/流动性/成交量,发现各主流链上新上线与热门代币,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 追踪新盘/meme 上新的 Agent 雷达。
- 入场前查看动量与流动性。
- 按代币地址或符号查交易对。

## 接口

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` — 一个或多个代币地址的全部 DEX 交易对(价格/流动性/成交量/FDV)
- `GET /latest/dex/search` — 按代币名称/符号/地址搜索交易对
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` — 最新代币档案(新发/发现雷达)

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网/Nile 测试网(`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网/Nile 测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```
zh-CN.mainTitle: 实时 DEX 交易对、价格与新盘
zh-CN.subtitle: 链上行情雷达:新盘、动量与流动性。

providers.description:
## What it does

DIA oracle price feeds over x402: transparent, multi-source aggregated token quotations across 80+ CEX/DEX markets for 3,000+ assets, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Agents needing verifiable reference prices for valuation or settlement.
- Manipulation-resistant pricing as a risk or compliance check.
- Cross-checking a venue spot price against an independent oracle.

## Endpoints

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet/Nile (`exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet/Nile with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

DIA 预言机价格的 x402 网关:跨 80+ CEX/DEX 市场、覆盖 3000+ 资产的透明多源聚合报价,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 需要可验证参考价做估值或结算的 Agent。
- 用抗操纵价格做风控/合规校验。
- 与盘口现价交叉验证。

## 接口

- `GET /v1/quotation/{symbol}` — 按资产符号聚合的价格报价
- `GET /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}` — 按链 + 合约地址聚合的价格报价

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网/Nile 测试网(`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网/Nile 测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-tron/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dia-price-bsc/v1/quotation/{symbol}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

providers.description:
## What it does

GoPlus Security API over x402: scan token contracts and wallet addresses for risks — honeypots, buy/sell tax, mintable/blacklist/proxy permissions and known malicious addresses — through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- Pre-trade safety screening before a swap.
- Wallet / address risk checks before transfers or approvals.
- Automated due-diligence inside agent trading flows.

## Endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — Token security report (honeypot, taxes, owner privileges, holders) for one or more contracts
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — Malicious-address check (sanctions, phishing, known scam)
- `GET /api/v2/token_approval_security/{chain_id}` — Token approval / allowance risk check for one or more wallet addresses; pass `addresses` as a query parameter

## Code usage

These routes are x402-paid passthroughs. Use x402 payment for gateway access. TRON Mainnet/Nile (`exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/728126428?contract_addresses=TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'
```

Pay on TRON Mainnet/Nile with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet (`eip155:56`, `exact` + `permit2`) example:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/56?contract_addresses=0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955'
```

Pay on BNB Smart Chain Mainnet/Testnet with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

GoPlus 安全 API 的 x402 网关:扫描代币合约与钱包地址风险——貔貅、买卖税、增发/黑名单/代理权限以及已知恶意地址,一个 provider 覆盖 TRON 与 BSC。

## 适合场景

- 兑换前的安全筛查。
- 转账或授权前的地址风险检查。
- Agent 交易流中的自动尽调。

## 接口

- `GET /api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}` — 代币安全报告(貔貅、买卖税、所有者权限、持币分布),支持单/多合约
- `GET /api/v1/address_security/{address}` — 恶意地址检测(制裁、钓鱼、已知诈骗)
- `GET /api/v2/token_approval_security/{chain_id}` — 钱包授权/额度风险检测; 通过 `addresses` 查询参数传入一个或多个地址

## 调用示例

这些是 x402 付费直通路由,通过 x402 支付后访问网关。TRON 主网/Nile 测试网(`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/728126428?contract_addresses=TR7NHqjeKQxGTCi8q8ZY4pL8otSzgjLj6t'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 TRON 主网/Nile 测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-tron/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网(`eip155:56`,`exact` + `permit2`)示例:

```bash
curl -sS 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/56?contract_addresses=0x55d398326f99059fF775485246999027B3197955'
```

使用 x402 CLI 在 BNB Smart Chain 主网/测试网付费(金额按 USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/goplus-token-security-bsc/api/v1/token_security/{chain_id}' \
  --method GET \
  --network eip155:56 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact \
  --max-amount 0.000001
```

zh-CN.subtitle: 交易前安全筛查:兑换、转账与授权。

providers.use_case: Use before buying a token, approving an allowance, or sending to an address: check if a token is a honeypot/scam, whether an address is malicious, and whether an approval is risky.
